Bullets fly in this new action packed battle arena game

Features

Blast Opponents
Action-packed gameplay with fun Roguelike and multiplayer battle arena gameplay.
Unique Heroes
Six different heroes classes, each with deadly upgradeable skills.
Powerful Weapons
Dominate the arena with three weapon classes to choose from.
Defeat Bosses
Survive challenging dungeons that culminate in a boss battle showdown.
Game Modes

Choose from the PvE Adventure and campaign modes. PvP Arena mode coming soon.

PVP Adventure
Farm completed levels for extra loot. New challenges that add strategic depth coming soon.
campaign
Blast your way through sinister plant monsters . Don't forget to level up and enhance your devastating weapons.
PvP Arena
Coming soon....

Heroes

Fox
  • Attack60
  • Hitpoints500
  • Defense30
  • Movement2.5
  • Evade20
  • Crit rate15
  • Crit damage40
  • Attack speed1

Spheria features a collection of 3K+ Hero Collectibles with 5 different rarities that can be sold on NFT marketplaces

Utility

Gameplay
Bring your Hero NFTs in-game to unlock new boosts and rewards.  
Play-to-Airdrop Rewards
Earn Peto Points with your NFTs in-game to earn tokens and unlock exclusive rewards.
Betting
Bet your NFT on the outcome of your PvP arena matches
Staking
Put your digital assets to work on the blockchain to earn additional crypto rewards.
Renting
Rent your NFTs to other people and earn additional profit sharing.
View Collection

Roadmap

Q1 2025
  • In-game Content & Events
  • NFT Launch
  • Game Modes - Survival, Monster Defeat
Q2 2025
  • NFT Renting
  • Play to Airdrop Campaign
  • In-game Content & Events
  • NFT Pet Sale
  • Game Modes - Free-for-all, Hold the Line
Q3 2025
  • Arena Ranking System
  • In-game Content & Events
  • Game Modes - Knock Out, Delivery
Q4 2025
  • In-game Content & Events
  • NFT Hero Skins
  • NFT Pet Sale
  • Game Modes - King of the Hill, Tower Defense
